title: Silky Pecorino Crumble
description: An earthy and silky Peruvian dish featuring pecorino cheese, designed to satisfy a midnight craving without nuts and packed with protein.

ingredients.name: Almond Flour or Gluten-Free Flour Blend

instructions: Grate the pecorino cheese and mix it with almond milk, almond flour or gluten-free flour blend, and a pinch of salt.
Fold in the nut-free-friendly elements by gently stirring until you achieve a smooth crumble texture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread out the crumble mixture evenly.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
